item.title: When George Carlin was arrested for saying the seven words you can't say on TV.
item.description: Comedian George Carlin was arrested at Summerfest on July 21, 1972 for saying the 'seven words you can't say on television' while opening for Arlo Guthrie. TMJ4 News spoke with Carlin the day after his arrest.

item.title: Happy Pride - Paxiti Cosplay
item.description:
Happy Pride to all my Trans girlies. I dusted off this week's cosplay: One of my favorite memes - I love that @imgur folks still use it often and people tag me all the time asking if I'll do it as a cosplay, surprise - I already did! I don't talk much about my identity on here, up until recently I never figured it was necessary. All I know is this community has always been the most supportive. So, I appreciate that. The current climate is a bitter one at the moment, so all I can say is, stay strong, stay supportive, and know that I feel for you.
The original reference pieces done by Paxiti on Twitter that inspired this look. Go check out their work!
Best custom mug I have ever ordered online :P
Custom making this wig was so much fun!
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

Do better Imgur! FP edit: thanks! Feel free to send cute puppy and kitty content!

item.title: Farewell Kabosu, aka Doge. May you rest in peace.
item.dc:creator: DeathIsNotMyPath

item.title: I have no idea what im going to do now.
item.description: I thought I found my person. he loved me so much in the beginning. he was so sweet and poetic and the kindest, most honest man I've ever met. I fell so hard for him I lost myself in this perfect dream of a future together where we were unabashedly happy and building our lives together. It wasn't just me. he encouraged these dreams. he was the one to talk about a house together and what he'd want for us in our future. We fell on hard times and we needed a new start, I left my job, moved away from my home, left everything behind me and was ready to rebuild now with my best friend by my side. But then he changed. It started with jokes. mean spirited jokes. the kind of "joke" where you can tell they are only just barely hiding what they really feel about you. Then it was disrespect... Any time I told him no, anything I said bothered me. he had to do it immediately. like I needed to be put in my place for daring to have a boundary. We stopped being intimate. sex, cuddles, any kind of affection from me was called me being "needy". We have talked. and talked. and talked again. it doesn't get any better. I have tried to meet in the middle. I have tried everything to see if he has some need I am not meeting, if the problem is me. he gets annoyed that I cry so much now. I know I need to leave. I just can't find the strength.
item.dc:creator: AlteraRunner

item.title: The 444th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2024 ep 4
item.description:
HAPPY PRIDE MONTH!
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays.
She'll get it someday
Me In IRL Life
Yep
I think Straight People were accidentally invented by the Bisexuals
YES HOMO
"She's from the other studio"
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He also made me one where the Chonk (me) is holding a Progress Pride flag and a Bi Pride flag. That will be featured at the end of next week's dumps. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales

item.title: PSA: Corporations pay fines so they can break laws.
item.description: A 2 million dollar fine is nothing in a 50 billion dollar pool. Breaking these laws should bankrupt companies, result in arrests and jailtime for offending CEOs directing these decisions and forced nationalization of the company in response to repeat offenses.
item.dc:creator: jhill

item.title: D-Day's 80th Anniversary [June 6th, 1944]
item.description:
Clarence Ware applies war paint to Charles Plauda, June 5, 1944. The idea was McNiece's, to honor his Native American heritage and to energize the men for the danger ahead. Part of the "Filthy Thirteen": The nickname given to the 1st Demolition Section of the Regimental Headquarters Company of the 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment, 101st Airborne Division
I have a great uncle buried there, he died fighting on Omaha Beach
"Into the Jaws of Hell"
Paratroopers of the 101st Airborne, the basis for "Band of Brothers", in combat training just before their D-Day mission
James Doohan (better known as Scotty on the original Star Trek) was part of the Normandy invasion On 6 June 1944, Doohan, by then promoted to Command Post Officer (captain), was among the Canadian forces sent to take Juno Beach in Normandy as part of the D-Day invasion. He was in command of one hundred and twenty men. He succesfully led his men across the sands and got lucky. Despite the anti-tank mines beneath their feet, none went off, as the men were not heavy enough to activate them. As they made their way to higher ground, Doohan managed to take out two German snipers – his first kills of the war. That night, Doohan was hit by machine-gun fire when returning to his command post, sustaining wounds in the leg, right hand, and chest – a cigarette case caught a bullet that would otherwise have killed him – and lost the middle finger of his right hand (because of this injury, outside of rare occasions, Doohan concealed that portion of his right hand in film shots). He didn't realize he had even been wounded until being later checked out by a med. "I was twenty-four," Doohan wrote in his book Beam Me Up, Scotty, "and if the Germans had been marginally better shots, I wouldn't have seen twenty-five."
"Piper" Bill Millin is best remembered for playing the bagpipes whilst under fire during the D-Day landing at Sword Beach. He played "Highland Laddie" "The Road to the Isles" and "All The Blue Bonnets Are Over The Border" as his comrades fell around him. Millin stated that he later talked to captured German snipers who claimed they did not shoot at him because they thought he had gone mad.
"Sword" Beach, one of the five main landing spots for the Allies at Normandy. Sword was to be the responsibility of the British Army with sea transport, mine sweeping and a naval bombardment force provided by the British Royal Navy as well as elements from the Polish, Norwegian and other Allied navies
The depiction of the French assault on Ouistreham, in an incredible one-shot from "The Longest Day" (1962). From 1942, the beach area became a no man's land; 123 villas by the sea were demolished to make way for the defenses of the Atlantic Wall: 80 concrete structures and an artillery observation post overlooking the beach “the big bunker” were built. This surveillance post became a strategic place and its capture ensured the landing point on Sword Beach. Commander Philippe Kieffer's No. 4 commando comprising the 177 French marines (given the honor of spearheading the advance), forming an integral part of Lord Lovat's first special brigade. They reached the bridges of Bénouville (Pegasus Bridge) and Ranville and thus operated the junction with the paratroopers of the 6th DAP (British Airborne) after street fighting in Ouistreham.
Sergeant Waverly B. Woodson Jr. administered first aid to at least 200 men on Omaha Beach during D-Day while wounded with shrapnel. He was denied the Medal of Honour because he was black.
At the memorial for the British Soldiers who died at Normandy
A wounded mine-detecting dog gets patched up
More from the "Filthy 13" of the 101st Airbourne
General Eisenhower meets with the 101st just before they make their jump into Normandy
Inflatable decoy tanks were dropped by parachute up the coast to fool the Nazis into thinking the invasion site would be there instead of at Normandy. Part of "Operation Fortitude"
How the news of D-Day was reported in Times Square, NYC
Aerial view of Utah Beach
D-Day planning map, used at Southwick House near Portsmouth.
"Standing with Giants" - part of the British Normandy Memorial
Pathfinders of the 2nd Battalion, 505th Parachute Infantry (82nd Airborne) and aircraft crew of plane # 1 0 - just before D-Day
Dummy paratroopers were deployed to confuse the Nazis on where the actual landing sites were supposed to be, part of "Operation Fortitude"
Royal Marine Commandos attached to 3rd Infantry Division move inland from Sword Beach
U.S. soldiers rescue shipwreck survivors on Utah Beach
General Theodore Roosevelt Jr, son of the 26th US President. He was the only general on D-Day to land with the first wave of troops, directing them at Utah Beach ( for which he received the Medal of Honor). He died of a heart-attack shortly thereafter in July of 1944.
An A-20 from the 416th Bomb Group making a bomb run on D-Day
The sight of a low-flying Allied plane sends Nazi soldiers rushing for cover on a beach in France, before D-Day June 1944. The aircraft was taking reconnaissance photos of German coastal barriers in preparation for the June 6th invasion.
Aerial view of part of the Allied force off the coast of France
General view of a port in England; in foreground, jeeps are being loaded onto landing craft – in background, larger trucks and ducks are being loaded
Thirteen liberty ships, deliberately scuttled to form a breakwater for invasion vessels landing on the Normandy beachhead lie in line off the beach, shielding the ships in shore. The artificial harbor engineering installation which was prefabricated and towed across the Channel.
Allied troop carriers near Omaha beach, one covered with a cloud of thick white smoke
Allied convoys of ships on the open sea
U.S. reinforcements wade through the surf as they land at Normandy in the days following the initial invasion
Three U.S. soldiers take a rest at the foot of a bunker which the Germans have painted and camouflaged to look like a house.
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: Airport Security is for show
item.description: 1) The retail worker at the gift shop has access to baggage as it's being transferred to or from planes. 2) The thief has done this multiple times 3) The Airport itself couldn't provide security camera footage, but the retail store could. 4) Americans are taking off their shoes and belts, losing nail clippers and hair gel, and having intrusive X-rays done, but any average Joe could get a retail job and stuff your luggage full of "16 oz. shampoo bottles" before the luggage is put on the plane. Sauce https://www.cnn.com/travel/airline-passenger-tracks-missing-bag-felony-theft/index.html
item.dc:creator: ReconditeEidolon

item.title: My baby girl crossed over the rainbow bridge today.
item.description: Her name is Cara. She was the sweetest and loved to give sloppy kisses with her floppy ears. I'll see you on the other side baby girl.
item.dc:creator: Piizzle

item.title: 68 lbs down in 10 months. I’m officially done losing weight! I’ve never felt better.
item.description: It’s been a lifelong struggle but I finally figured it out and I finally made it! Had the help of a coach plus therapy to address undiagnosed mental health issues that contributed to my problems with weight plus a newfound passion for Pilates ;) and I beat my sugar addiction ? I did not count calories - I just followed my coaches guidelines for portion control and what to eat and started with modest amounts of exercise (20 mins a day + my evening walks). I exercise more now because I just love it!
item.dc:creator: triedandtruerecipes

item.title: Shut up and take my money
item.dc:creator: MrMrsCrowley
